selected_title: INNOVATION IDEA IN NEW FOOD PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT
question: Where does “INNOVATION IDEA IN NEW FOOD PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT” support or contradict the causal account advanced by “How Can Firms’ Basic Research Turn Into Product Innovation? The Role of Absorptive Capacity and Industry Appropriability”?

evidence_spans.text: New food product development include innovation, assessment, development, and execution, of which, innovation idea plays an important role in product development. Innovation idea decides success probability of new product in the marketplace. It also decides the future of enterprise. Idea innovating can generate new good food product concept.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses New product development, Product innovation through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 48 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
